case_title: BLU J. MORRIS VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, BLU J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY DBA GE CAPITAL THE CLAIM AGAINST GENERAL ELECTRIC IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-14-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY DBA GE CAPITAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY DBA GE CAPITAL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY MORRIS, BLU J. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY DBA GE CAPITAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DEBORAH DANILOFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DEBORAH DANILOFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
